notes:
Two updates available.

1) Critical fix (apply in 30 seconds): Resolves a "Bandwidth quota exceeded" error in refreshPersona that can hit on first run with a heavy sent folder. In Apps Script → Code.gs, press Ctrl+H and replace:

  Find: newer_than:90d", 0, 100
  Replace: newer_than:30d", 0, 50

  Find: msg.getPlainBody().substring(0, 300)
  Replace: msg.getPlainBody().substring(0, 150)

Save (Ctrl+S). Done.

2) New feature — multi-language support: PersonaOS now supports British English, German, French, and Spanish as your primary working language, and reply drafts automatically match the language of incoming emails (German in → German reply, French in → French reply, etc.). To enable, re-run the PersonaOS setup wizard, choose your primary language on the Persona step, and paste the new script into Apps Script (overwrite Code.gs). Re-running the wizard also includes the critical fix above. Your API key, persona profiles, and triggers all live in Script Properties and are preserved either way.
patchInstructions:
Critical fix (30 seconds, no wizard re-run needed):

Resolves a "Bandwidth quota exceeded" error in refreshPersona that can hit on first run with a heavy sent folder.

  1. Open Apps Script → Code.gs
  2. Press Ctrl+H (find & replace)
  3. Find newer_than:90d", 0, 100 → Replace newer_than:30d", 0, 50
  4. Find msg.getPlainBody().substring(0, 300) → Replace msg.getPlainBody().substring(0, 150)
  5. Save (Ctrl+S)

New feature — multi-language support (British English / German / French / Spanish):

Reply drafts now auto-match the language of incoming emails (German in → German reply, etc), and you can set a primary working language for outbound communication.

  1. Re-run the PersonaOS setup wizard
  2. On the Persona step, choose your primary working language
  3. Generate the new script and paste it into Apps Script (overwrite Code.gs)
  4. Save (Ctrl+S)

Re-running the wizard also includes the critical fix above. Your API key, persona profiles, and triggers are preserved — all stored in Script Properties.
